back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 4.0.2 to 3.4.3 to align with the Java 21 migration and access newer framework features.
back-end/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.x (or the specific 3.4.3 version) is required to support Java 21 baseline and may contain breaking API changes incompatible with the old parent version.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21.
back-end/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; compiling with Java 17 settings on a JDK 21 target or vice-versa causes compilation errors or missing feature support.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated spring-boot-starter-webmvc with spring-boot-starter-web.
back-end/pom.xml.why_exists: spring-boot-starter-webmvc was removed in Spring Boot 3.0; using it causes a dependency resolution failure or missing classes at runtime.
The artifact may have been removed or renamed in the new Spring Boot version, causing build failures if retained without update.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated test starters with the unified spring-boot-starter-test.
back-end/pom.xml.why_exists: Individual test starters like spring-boot-starter-data-jpa-test were removed in Spring Boot 3.0; retaining them causes dependency resolution errors.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target configuration to Java 21.
back-end/pom.xml.why_exists: Explicitly setting source/target to 21 ensures the compiler uses Java 21 language features and bytecode, preventing compilation errors on the new JDK.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on PatrimonioRepository from the controller, delegating all data access to PatrimonioService.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: PatrimonioRepository is no longer injected or used in the controller constructor or methods.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.before: private final PatrimonioRepository patrimonioRepository; ... public PatrimonioController(PatrimonioRepository patrimonioRepository, PatrimonioService patrimonioService)

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Refactors the GET / endpoint to support pagination and filtering instead of returning a simple list.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: API contract change: The endpoint signature and return type (Page vs List) have changed, requiring client updates.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Removes the specific GET /{id} endpoint for fetching a single patrimony by ID.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: API contract change: The endpoint is removed, causing 404 for clients expecting this specific path.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Removes the GET /buscaNome endpoint for searching by name.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: API contract change: The endpoint is removed.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Removes the GET /buscaMarca endpoint for searching by brand.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: API contract change: The endpoint is removed.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Removes the GET /etiqueta/{numeroEtiqueta} endpoint for searching by tag number.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: API contract change: The endpoint is removed.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Renames the service method called during update from 'update' to 'updatePatrimonio'.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: The method 'update' does not exist on PatrimonioService in the new version.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Refactors the DELETE endpoint to use a boolean return from service instead of Optional from repository.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: PatrimonioRepository is removed, and service method signature changed to return boolean.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Replace Spring HATEOAS link generation with standard Spring Data pagination and transactional annotations.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Removal of HATEOAS dependencies and methods breaks compilation if not removed; addition of @Transactional and Pageable is required for new service logic.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add iText library imports for PDF generation functionality.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for com.lowagie.text classes if dependency is not present and imports are added.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add Hibernate Envers imports for audit history retrieval.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for org.hibernate.envers classes if dependency is not present and imports are added.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add Jakarta Persistence and Servlet imports for EntityManager and HTTP response handling.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for jakarta.persistence and jakarta.servlet classes.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add standard Java utility imports for date, math, and stream operations used in new methods.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for java.time, java.math, java.util.stream classes.
